content: We can reframe the original task-agnostic Self-Refine framework as a meta-structure that organizes multiple perspective-based LLM self-reflection mechanisms, turning single-path iterative self-feedback into a multi-view iterative refinement tree. Each branch of the tree corresponds to an inconsistent solving perspective from self-reflection mechanisms like Self-Contrast, and the entire framework still retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra training or supervised data.
